about.description: Based in Dallas, Texas, we specialize in solar panel installations for both roofing contractors and homeowners. We excel in 'Solar Detach & Reinstalls', providing certified and insured solutions. Our skilled crew is proficient in solar racking and troubleshooting systems, ensuring every project meets the highest standards of quality and efficiency.

image.alt: Renewable Modern Energy professional solar crew

description: Renewable Modern Energy LLC was founded with a singular focus: to bridge the gap between roofing and solar. We saw a need for a specialized, certified partner that roofing contractors could trust to handle the delicate process of solar detach and reinstalls.

With over five years of hands-on experience, our skilled crew has mastered solar racking, system troubleshooting, and efficient project execution. We ensure every panel is removed and reinstalled safely, protecting the homeowner's investment and warranty.

Our unique estimate generation feature sets us apart, providing accurate, transparent quotes for both homeowners and contractors. Whether you need a one-time detach or an ongoing partnership, we are committed to the highest standards of quality and efficiency.

image.alt: Certified Solar Technician - Renewable Modern Energy

description: Renewable Modern Energy LLC is your go-to expert for solar panel detach and reinstall services. Whether you're a roofing contractor needing a reliable partner or a homeowner facing a roof repair, we ensure your solar system is handled with care.
Our transparent pricing and unique estimate generation feature make it easy to plan your project. Book our individual services or explore a long-term partnership.

section.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
section.description: Expert answers to common questions about solar detach, reinstall, estimate generation, and our services.

items.question: What is a solar detach and reinstall?
items.answer: A solar detach and reinstall (D&R) is the process of safely removing your solar panel system from your roof, storing it while roof repairs or replacements are completed, and then reinstalling it professionally. This protects your solar investment and maintains your roof warranty.

items.question: How can a roofing contractor partner with you?
items.answer: We make it easy! By partnering with Renewable Modern Energy, you can expand your service offerings and win more bids. We act as your certified, insured solar subcontractor, handling all D&R work. Contact us to set up a partnership and get access to our unique estimate generation tool.

items.question: How does the estimate generation work?
items.answer: Our unique estimate generation feature provides accurate, transparent quotes tailored for your specific project. Simply contact us with project details, and we'll provide a clear breakdown of costs for the detach and reinstall services, helping you bid with confidence.

items.question: How long does the detach and reinstall process take?
items.answer: A typical residential detach takes about 1 hour, while a reinstall takes approximately 2.5 hours. The total time can vary based on system size, roof complexity, and weather. We coordinate closely with your roofing contractor to fit the timeline perfectly.

items.question: Are you certified and insured?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely. Renewable Modern Energy LLC is fully certified and insured. We provide proof of insurance for all projects, giving both contractors and homeowners complete peace of mind that their solar investment is in safe hands.

items.question: What other services do you offer besides detach and reinstall?
items.answer: While D&R is our specialty, our skilled crew is also proficient in solar racking, system troubleshooting, and diagnostics. We can help identify performance issues and make necessary repairs to get your system back to peak efficiency.

items.question: Why should roofing contractors consider solar partnerships?
items.answer: The roofing industry is evolving, and homeowners increasingly seek sustainable solutions. By partnering with us, you can say 'yes' to more jobs, expand your revenue streams, and differentiate your business from competitors who aren't solar-ready.

items.question: Will removing my panels void my solar warranty?
items.answer: It can, if not done by a certified professional. That's why we are fully certified and follow strict protocols. Our process ensures your system is handled correctly, protecting your manufacturer's warranty and your investment.

items.question: Do you offer free estimates?
items.answer: Yes! We offer free, no-obligation estimate generation. Contact us by phone at 469-334-9629 or email RenewableModernEnergy@gmail.com with your project details, and we'll provide a clear, accurate quote.

items.question: How do you coordinate with my roofer?
items.answer: We communicate directly with your roofing contractor to align on timelines. The ideal process is: we detach the panels, the roofer completes the work, and then we return to reinstall the system. We handle all solar-related logistics.
